category_sources: Official GitHub README describes n as an interactive Node.js version manager.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use n.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface with supported platforms, installation, usage, and options.

tags_sources: Official README documents installing, selecting, removing, and running Node.js versions.
source_facts.description and executable identify a Node version manager CLI.
